task_completion.description: Agent successfully logs into Oscar EMR
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Oscar EMR main dashboard, schedule screen, or patient search screen indicating a successful login.

task_completion.description: Agent searches for the patient records
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a patient search interface displaying results for 'Smith', 'Robert James', 'Rob J', or the specific demographic numbers 10001 and 10002.

task_completion.description: Agent accesses the patient merge functionality
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Merge Patients', 'Merge Records', or 'Update Patient' interface being opened in the Oscar EMR system.

task_completion.description: Agent correctly assigns primary and duplicate records
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the merge interface showing demographic_no 10001 ('Robert James Smith') as the 'Primary' or 'Target' record, and 10002 ('Rob J Smith') as the 'Duplicate' or 'Source' record.

task_completion.description: Agent ensures the penicillin allergy is preserved during the merge
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a checkbox, toggle, or data selection in the merge interface ensuring the 'penicillin' allergy from the duplicate record is selected to be kept or transferred.

task_completion.description: Agent completes the merge and verifies the consolidated record
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a success message indicating the merge is complete, or the final patient chart/summary for 'Robert James Smith' (10001) displaying the penicillin allergy.

integrity.description: Agent used the Oscar EMR web interface to perform the merge
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the agent interacted with the Oscar EMR web interface in a web browser, rather than using terminal commands, API calls, or scripts.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual EMR application
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure the screenshots show the actual Oscar EMR web application UI and not a text editor, local HTML file, or mock-up.

integrity.description: Agent did not bypass the UI using direct database queries
integrity.visual_evidence: Verify that no SQL clients, database administration tools, or terminal windows were used to directly run UPDATE or DELETE queries on the database.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Primary record ID: 10001. Duplicate record ID: 10002. Patient DOB: 1965-05-20. Patient Last Name: Smith. Username: oscardoc. PIN: 1117. Note: The official Oscar EMR default demo password is 'mac2002', which the agent may need to use if the provided password 'oscar' fails.
